San Diego, California

Who I Am

I'm Javier Skipper,
a multidisciplinary designer
with over five years building
immersive experiences.

My background spans digital campaign design, experiential activations, and visual merchandising — developed across the Estée Lauder Companies portfolio, where I worked across Tom Ford Beauty, Jo Malone London, Balmain Paris, La Mer, Aramis, and more.

What drives my practice is the space where sensation meets intention — where craft and consciousness combine to make people feel something they carry long after they leave the room.

Outside of client work, I'm a student of consciousness — exploring spirituality, sacred geometry, and the deeper architectures of human experience. I currently work as an independent creative director, partnering with wellness brands, retreat facilitators, and luxury venues to design experiences from concept through execution.

Sources of inspiration

Walt Disney Universe · Avatar · ILM
Imaginary Forces · Moment Factory

What I Build

Four worlds. One practice.

Retreat & Sacred
Gathering Design

Full-arc experience design for retreats, ceremonies, and sacred gatherings. From the arrival ritual to the closing circle — every moment designed to hold the depth of what wants to happen.

Spatial Design Ritual Architecture Vendor Direction Atmosphere

Conscious Luxury
Brand Experience

Brand identity, campaign design, and experiential activations for wellness brands and conscious luxury houses. Translating a brand's values into environments and moments people feel in their body.

Brand Identity Campaign Design Activations Visual Systems

Astrology & Cosmic
Ritual Experiences

Environmental and brand design for astrologers, cosmic gathering series, and celestial-themed events. Making the invisible architectures of time and space visible, tangible, and felt.

Event Identity Spatial Concept Celestial Design Ritual Design

AI-Integrated
Spiritual Wellness

Concept and creative direction for AI-powered wellness platforms and digital spiritual experiences. Designing the intersection of emerging technology and ancient human longing — with intention.

Platform Concept UX Direction World-Building AI Integration

How I Work

The ritual of making

I

Attunement

Listening before designing

Understanding the experience before designing it. I begin by listening — to what you're building, who it's for, and what wants to exist. This phase involves deep conversation, site visits when possible, and a complete immersion in the brand world, the facilitator's intention, or the event's energetic purpose. Nothing is designed until the premise is right.

II

Architecture

Building the structure that holds the experience

The spatial, sensory, and narrative framework. This is where concept becomes system — the floor plan, the lighting language, the arrival sequence, the material palette, the brand visual identity, the schedule as an emotional arc. Every decision is downstream of the founding intention.

III

Activation

Bringing it into the world

Overseeing every detail from concept through the moment it's felt. Vendor briefing, on-site creative direction, quality control, and the final calibration that makes a designed space feel lived-in and alive. The work isn't done until the room holds what it was designed to hold.

Begin Here

If you're building something that needs to be felt as much as seen —

I'd love to begin.
